explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.

closing.summary: Whey Protein Isolate has a genuinely strong overall case, especially easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. the downsides are there, but very processed compared with whole dairy and fat quality varies wildly across dairy do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

scenes.narrationText: fat is 1g. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
